---
title: "The Forest Plot"
subtitle: "Standards for Evidence Synthesis"
---

# The Plot Explained

## State-of-the-art example

![](images/authors.png)

## The outcome

-   Recurrence of vulvovaginal candidiasis at the end of follow up

-   A binary outcome

    -   Numerical: point estimate (RR) for each study, then pooled summary (Weighted average).

    -   Graphical: Forest plot

## The Plot

![](images/1.png)

## The Plot

![](images/2.png)

## The Plot

![](images/3.png)

## The Plot

![](images/4.png)

## The Plot

![](images/5.png)

## The Plot

![](images/6.png)

## The Plot

![](images/7.png)

## The Plot

![](images/8.png)

## Eyeballing to detect heterogeneity

![](images/clipboard-83334266.png)

# Thank you
